name: Rapamycin, Not Metformin, Mirrors Dietary Restriction-Driven Lifespan Extension in Vertebrates: A Meta-Analysis
summary: 2025 Aging Cell meta-analysis comparing dietary restriction, rapamycin, and metformin lifespan effects across vertebrates; it reports significant rapamycin lifespan extension while emphasizing heterogeneity, publication bias, and sensitivity to lifespan-reporting methods.
